CEQA MOTION, 503, REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST EUSTACE DE SAINT PHALLE AND DUDLEY SAINT PHALLE'S DEMURRER FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS UNDER THE CALIFORNIA ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY ACT (CEQA), RELATED TO THE PETITION'S FAILURE TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT WILL ISSUE A WRITTEN RULING. UPON THE RULING ON THIS DEMURRER, IF THE CASE PROCEEDS, MR. BRUNO IS TO SUBMIT FEES TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY SEPT-20- 2019 TO START PREPARING TRANSCRIPTS. THE CEQA - CMC WILL REMAIN ON CALENDAR FOR OCT-11-2019 AT 9:30AM FOR THE COURT TO SET CERTIFICATION DATE ON BRIEFING SCHEDULE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, CLERK: S. LE, MATTER NOT REPORTED. (503)
